message:
test(fj-conformance): add oracle tests for comparison primitives

Adds 45 comprehensive oracle tests for Eq, Ne, Lt, Le, Gt, Ge primitives:
- Basic comparisons with equal/different values
- Zero comparisons (including +0.0 == -0.0)
- Negative number handling
- Infinity handling
- NaN semantics (all comparisons false except Ne)
- Integer (i64) comparisons
- 1D and 2D tensor shapes
- Relationship tests:
  - Eq/Ne are complements (except NaN)
  - Lt/Ge and Gt/Le are complements
  - Lt/Gt and Le/Ge swap symmetry
  - Eq symmetry
  - Trichotomy (exactly one of <, ==, > is true)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
